steps.title: Set up the inequality from the constraint
steps.content: The total cost is $60h$ dollars for the rental plus $10$ dollars for the course, where $h$ is the number of hours. Since Maria wants to spend no more than $280$ dollars: $$60h + 10 \leq 280$$

steps.title: Solve the inequality
steps.content: Subtract 10 from both sides: $$60h \leq 270$$ Divide both sides by 60: $$h \leq \frac{270}{60} = \frac{9}{2} = 4.5$$

steps.title: Apply the whole number constraint
steps.content:
Since $h$ must be a whole number of hours and $h \leq 4.5$, the maximum value of $h$ is 4. Verify: $60(4) + 10 = 240 + 10 = 250 \leq 280$ ✓
The maximum number of hours is 4.
